buildings.name: Casa Malasaña
buildings.petPolicy: Small dogs and cats allowed with €50/month pet fee
buildings.description: A vibrant coliving space in the heart of Malasaña, Madrid's most creative neighborhood. Walking distance to Gran Vía and the best independent cafés and vintage shops.

buildings.name: Vive Chueca
buildings.description: Modern coliving in Chueca, Madrid's most cosmopolitan neighborhood. Steps from Fuencarral street shopping and Reina Sofía museum.

buildings.name: Cotown Eixample
buildings.description: Barcelona coliving in the elegant Eixample district. Near Sagrada Familia and Passeig de Gràcia. The building features modernist architecture with a beautiful interior courtyard.
